description: NexonGreen delivers cutting-edge IT services — from IoT and mobile apps to web design, WordPress, portfolio creation, and digital forensics.

items.label: IoT Solutions
items.title: Connected Devices
items.text: We design and develop smart IoT systems that connect devices, automate processes, and deliver real-time data insights for businesses.

items.label: App & Web
items.title: Mobile & Web Dev
items.text: From mobile apps to WordPress websites and custom web platforms, we build scalable, user-friendly digital experiences.

items.label: Portfolio & Forensics
items.title: Specialized Services
items.text: We craft stunning personal portfolios and provide professional digital forensics support using tools like FTK.
